packageRules.description: Force Renovate to evaluate patches independently, but strictly IGNORE alphas/betas
Disable minor, major, and prerelease updates for Python (pep621/pyenv managers)
Disable Python updates via pixi entirely to avoid pep440 range calculation failures on pre-releases
Major bumps must be reviewed: dedicated PR editing pyproject.toml, never auto-merged
Minor/patch on pyproject deps: safe to auto-merge alongside lockfile maintenance
CalVer packages (yt-dlp YYYY.M.D, rush YYYY.M.D): pin exactly so lockFileMaintenance cannot silently update them; use pep440 for correct version comparison
CalVer packages: all updates require manual review regardless of version component
